TITLE: Thirtysixth · Monday Music Mix
EYEBROW: Mix detail
H1: Thirtysixth
COPY: Also known as the Tuesday music mix. One week and one day later than originally should’ve been out in the wild. Some new, some old and reimagined.
BUTTON: Back to archive
EYEBROW: Listening

H2: Full sequence
COPY: 14 tracks · 3 favorites highlighted

TRACK: 02 Beloved — Say Lou Lou
TRACK: 03 Realize You — Empress Of
TRACK: 04 Lost Boys and Girls Club — Dum Dum Girls
TRACK: 05 (I Just) Died In Your Arms Tonight (Cutting Crew cover) — Bastille
TRACK: 06 You’re Not Good Enough — Blood Orange Favorite
TRACK: 07 Old Love New Love — Twin Shadow
TRACK: 08 London Light — STRANGERS
TRACK: 09 Will Calls — Grizzly Bear
TRACK: 10 Remurdered — Mogwai
TRACK: 11 A Real Hero (College & Electric Youth cover) — High Highs
TRACK: 12 Summer Time Sadness (Lana Del Rey cover) — Angel Haze Favorite
TRACK: 13 Mirror — Ellie Goulding
TRACK: 14 Love You Better (John Dillinger remix) — Oh Land Favorite
EYEBROW: Context
H2: Archive notes
COPY: Contains some of the best music I have heard in a quite a192 while.
